title: MoFaCTS TDF Schema
description: Schema for MoFaCTS tutor definition files, including lesson metadata, delivery settings, unit configuration, and adaptive session definitions.

lessonname.title: Full display name for the lesson.
lessonname.description: Full name shown to learners and in reporting.

stimulusfile.title: Filename of the stimulus JSON file.
stimulusfile.description: Stimulus/content filename paired with this TDF.

name.title: Short internal lesson name.
name.description: Short internal identifier used for tracking or exports.

experimentTarget.title: Direct experiment URL target.
experimentTarget.description: Path segment used for no-login experiment links.

userselect.title: Show lesson on the learner dashboard.
userselect.description: When enabled, learners can pick this lesson directly from their dashboard.

allowRevisitUnit.title: Allow revisiting the current unit from instructions.
allowRevisitUnit.description: When enabled at the lesson level, instruction screens expose the current-unit revisit path so a learner can return to the unit instead of only continuing forward.

lfparameter.title: Fuzzy matching threshold.
lfparameter.description: Edit-distance / fuzzy-match threshold used during answer evaluation.

hintsEnabled.title: Enable syllable-based hints.
hintsEnabled.description: Turns hint-generation support on for qualifying prompt text.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Lesson category tags used for organization and filtering.

shuffleclusters.title: Shuffle cluster groups.
shuffleclusters.description: Space-delimited start-end ranges that are shuffled within their own group.

swapclusters.title: Swap cluster group order.
swapclusters.description: Space-delimited cluster ranges treated as shuffleable groups.

enableAudioPromptAndFeedback.title: Enable text-to-speech prompts and feedback.
enableAudioPromptAndFeedback.description: Advertises and enables lesson audio prompt/feedback support.

speechAPIKey.title: Speech recognition API key.
speechAPIKey.description: Google Speech API key used for speech recognition.

textToSpeechAPIKey.title: Text-to-speech API key.
textToSpeechAPIKey.description: Google TTS API key used for lesson audio output.

audioInputEnabled.title: Enable speech recognition.
audioInputEnabled.description: Enables microphone-based speech recognition for the lesson.

speechRecognitionLanguage.title: Speech-recognition language code.
speechRecognitionLanguage.description: Google Speech-to-Text language code used for microphone transcription, such as "en-US" or "es-ES".

audioInputSensitivity.title: Speech detection threshold.
audioInputSensitivity.description: Approximate dB threshold used when deciding whether incoming audio counts as speech.

audioPromptMode.title: Default TTS mode.
audioPromptMode.description: Default learner audio mode when opening the lesson.

textToSpeechLanguage.title: Text-to-speech language code.
textToSpeechLanguage.description: Google Text-to-Speech language code used for synthesized audio, such as "en-US" or "es-ES".

speechIgnoreOutOfGrammarResponses.title: Ignore speech not in the answer set.
speechIgnoreOutOfGrammarResponses.description: Discard speech transcripts that do not match the active grammar/answer set.

speechOutOfGrammarFeedback.title: Message for ignored speech input.
speechOutOfGrammarFeedback.description: Feedback shown when out-of-grammar speech is discarded.

audioPromptVoice.title: Question voice ID.
audioPromptVoice.description: Voice identifier used for spoken question prompts.

audioPromptFeedbackVoice.title: Feedback voice ID.
audioPromptFeedbackVoice.description: Voice identifier used for spoken feedback prompts.

audioPromptQuestionSpeakingRate.title: Question speaking rate.
audioPromptQuestionSpeakingRate.description: Speech speed multiplier for question prompts.

audioPromptFeedbackSpeakingRate.title: Feedback speaking rate.
audioPromptFeedbackSpeakingRate.description: Speech speed multiplier for feedback prompts.

audioPromptQuestionVolume.title: Question TTS volume.
audioPromptQuestionVolume.description: Volume adjustment in decibels for spoken question prompts.

audioPromptFeedbackVolume.title: Feedback TTS volume.
audioPromptFeedbackVolume.description: Volume adjustment in decibels for spoken feedback prompts.

loadbalancing.title: Condition assignment mode.
loadbalancing.description: Controls root-TDF experiment condition load balancing.

countcompletion.title: When participant counts increment.
countcompletion.description: Controls when condition completion counts are incremented.

condition.title: Conditions
condition.description: Condition TDF filenames used by root experiments.

conditionTdfIds.title: Condition TDF IDs
conditionTdfIds.description: Server-resolved TDF IDs corresponding to condition filenames. Used by experiment dashboards and package workflows.

duedate.title: Class practice due date.
duedate.description: Due date used by instructor reporting/class practice deadline UI.

showPageNumbers.title: Show page numbers.
showPageNumbers.description: Controls whether page numbers are shown in the legacy lesson chrome.

recordInstructions.title: Record instruction viewing time.
recordInstructions.description: Controls instruction-view logging. Supports true/false or an array of unit numbers whose instruction screens should be recorded.

randomizedDelivery.title: Randomized Delivery
randomizedDelivery.description: Legacy array-based count used to randomize delivery/x-condition selection.

prestimulusDisplay.title: Prestimulus prompt text.
prestimulusDisplay.description: Prompt text shown before the main stimulus appears.

tips.title: Tips
tips.description: Instructional tip strings displayed before or during lesson entry.

progressReporterParams.title: Progress Reporter Params
progressReporterParams.description: Numeric parameters used by the legacy progress reporter calculations.

disableProgressReport.title: Hide the progress report.
disableProgressReport.description: Disables learner progress report display when enabled.

experimentPasswordRequired.title: Require an experiment password.
experimentPasswordRequired.description: Adds a password gate before experiment entry.

simTimeout.title: Simulation time per trial.
simTimeout.description: Per-trial timing used by simulation/testing flows.

simCorrectProb.title: Simulation accuracy probability.
simCorrectProb.description: Probability of a correct response during simulated runs.

unitinstructions.title: Instructions shown before the unit.
unitinstructions.description: HTML or text instructions shown before the unit begins.

buttonorder.title: Button arrangement order.
buttonorder.description: Controls fixed vs randomized button order.

buttontrial.title: Use the button-based answer UI.
buttontrial.description: Enable button-choice trials instead of typed responses.

buttonOptions.title: Button choices.
buttonOptions.description: Comma-delimited list of button trial options.

instructionminseconds.title: Minimum instruction time.
instructionminseconds.description: Minimum number of seconds learners must remain on instructions.

instructionmaxseconds.title: Maximum instruction time.
instructionmaxseconds.description: Maximum number of seconds learners may remain on instructions.

picture.title: Instruction image filename.
picture.description: Image shown alongside the instruction content.

continueButtonText.title: Continue button label override.
continueButtonText.description: Unit-level override for the continue button label.

countcompletion.title: Increment participant count on this unit.

recordInstructions.title: Record this instruction screen.
recordInstructions.description: Controls whether instruction viewing time is logged for this unit.

turkemailsubject.title: MTurk reminder email subject.
turkemailsubject.description: Subject line used for Turk reminder messages.

turkemail.title: MTurk reminder email body.
turkemail.description: Body text for Turk reminder messages.

turkbonus.title: MTurk bonus amount.
turkbonus.description: Bonus amount associated with reaching this unit.

adaptiveUnitTemplate.title: Adaptive Unit Templates
adaptiveUnitTemplate.description: Unit-template indices used when adaptive logic inserts new units.

adaptiveLogic.title: Adaptive Logic
adaptiveLogic.description: Maps unit indices to arrays of adaptive branching rules.

oneOf.title: Delivery Settings
oneOf.description: Canonical learner-runtime delivery settings for timing, feedback, answer controls, prompt presentation, and related lesson behavior.

forceCorrection.title: Require correct answer entry before advancing.
forceCorrection.description: When "true", forces the learner to type the correct response after feedback before proceeding.

forceSpacing.title: Prevent immediate repeats in adaptive scheduling.
forceSpacing.description: When "true", the adaptive scheduler requires at least one intervening trial before the same item can be selected again.

optimalThreshold.title: Target recall probability for adaptive scheduling.
optimalThreshold.description: Probability threshold used by the adaptive scheduler when selecting the next item; values should be between 0 and 1.

studyFirst.title: Probability of showing study before first drill.
studyFirst.description: Controls whether an item is first presented as study before drill/test; 0 disables it, 1 always shows study first, and values between 0 and 1 apply probabilistically.

purestudy.title: Study-trial duration in milliseconds.
purestudy.description: Milliseconds to display an item during study-only trials. Example: 16000 = 16 seconds. A value of 0 means no study timeout.

drill.title: Answer timeout in milliseconds.
drill.description: Milliseconds before a drill/test response times out. The timer resets on each keypress where applicable. Example: 30000 = 30 seconds; 0 = no timeout.

practicetimer.title: Practice timer mode.
practicetimer.description: Selects the practice timing mode; "clock-based" uses elapsed seconds from practiceseconds to end practice.

practiceseconds.title: Practice duration in seconds.
practiceseconds.description: Number of elapsed seconds used by clock-based practice timing before the unit advances.

displayMinSeconds.title: Minimum display time in seconds.
displayMinSeconds.description: Minimum elapsed seconds before the learner can continue from a timed learning or video unit. A value of 0 allows immediate continue.

displayMaxSeconds.title: Maximum display time in seconds.
displayMaxSeconds.description: Maximum elapsed seconds before a timed learning or video unit advances automatically. A value of 0 disables automatic advance.

reviewstudy.title: Incorrect-review duration in milliseconds.
reviewstudy.description: Milliseconds to display the item after an incorrect response for review. Example: 6000 = 6 seconds.

correctprompt.title: Correct-feedback duration in milliseconds.
correctprompt.description: Milliseconds to display correct-answer feedback before advancing. Example: 750 = 0.75 seconds.

skipstudy.title: Allow study trials to be skipped.
skipstudy.description: When "true", study trials can be skipped from the learner interface instead of waiting for the study duration to finish.

lockoutminutes.title: Lockout length in minutes before the next unit.
lockoutminutes.description: Minutes a learner must wait before proceeding to the next unit. Used for spaced retention intervals.

fontsize.title: Stimulus font size.
fontsize.description: CSS font size used for stimulus display. The current Svelte card interprets this as a numeric pixel size; default is 24.

autostopTranscriptionAttemptLimit.title: Maximum speech-recognition retry attempts.
autostopTranscriptionAttemptLimit.description: Upper limit on speech-recognition attempts before the session stops retrying transcription for the card.

timeuntilaudio.title: Delay before question audio in milliseconds.
timeuntilaudio.description: Milliseconds to wait before playing question audio or prompt text-to-speech. Default: 0.

prestimulusdisplaytime.title: Prestimulus prompt duration in milliseconds.
prestimulusdisplaytime.description: Milliseconds to display the prestimulus prompt before the question appears.

forceCorrectPrompt.title: Force-correction prompt
forceCorrectPrompt.description: Message shown when a learner must type the correct answer before continuing after incorrect-answer feedback. Authored capitalization is preserved.

forcecorrecttimeout.title: Force-correction timeout in milliseconds.
forcecorrecttimeout.description: Milliseconds to wait during the force-correction phase before timing out that state.

checkOtherAnswers.title: Reject near-matches that equal another item’s answer.
checkOtherAnswers.description: When enabled, edit-distance matching will not accept a near-match that exactly matches another current stimulus answer.

falseAnswerLimit.title: Maximum incorrect attempts allowed for a button trial.
falseAnswerLimit.description: Maximum incorrect responses allowed for each button trial before moving on. Leave blank for no configured limit.

allowPhoneticMatching.title: Enable phonetic answer matching.
allowPhoneticMatching.description: When "true", enables Double Metaphone phonetic matching as a fallback during answer evaluation after exact and edit-distance checks fail.

branchingEnabled.title: Enable branched-answer parsing.
branchingEnabled.description: Allows semicolon-separated branched answer definitions to be treated as branching responses during answer evaluation.

resetStudentPerformance.title: Reset displayed progress for the unit.
resetStudentPerformance.description: When "true", resets the learner’s displayed progress for the unit. Historical data is preserved; only the displayed progress is reset.

allowRevisitUnit.title: Allow revisiting the current unit from instructions.
allowRevisitUnit.description: When "true", instruction screens expose the current-unit revisit path so a learner can return to the unit instead of only continuing forward.

readyPromptStringDisplayTime.title: Ready-prompt duration in milliseconds.
readyPromptStringDisplayTime.description: Milliseconds to wait during the ready-prompt phase between trials before the next display/input phase begins.

studyOnlyFields.title: Display fields for study-only trials.
studyOnlyFields.description: Comma-delimited stimulus display fields shown on study-only trials, such as "imgSrc,audioSrc". Leave blank to show the full display.

drillFields.title: Display fields for drill/test trials.
drillFields.description: Comma-delimited stimulus display fields shown on drill/test trials and their review feedback, such as "text,audioSrc". Leave blank to show the full display.

stimuliPosition.title: Prompt placement.
stimuliPosition.description: Position of the prompt relative to the response area. Options are "top" or "left"; default is "top".

displayCorrectFeedback.title: Show correct feedback
displayCorrectFeedback.description: When enabled, learners see feedback after correct answers. When disabled, correct answers still count as correct, but no correct-answer feedback is displayed or spoken.

displayIncorrectFeedback.title: Show incorrect feedback
displayIncorrectFeedback.description: When enabled, learners see feedback after incorrect answers and timeouts. When disabled, incorrect outcomes still count as incorrect, but no incorrect-answer feedback is displayed or spoken.

correctLabelText.title: Correct feedback label
correctLabelText.description: Text used for the leading outcome label on correct-answer feedback. This label does not replace evaluator explanations such as close-enough or phonetic-match messages.

incorrectLabelText.title: Incorrect feedback label
incorrectLabelText.description: Text used for the leading outcome label on incorrect-answer and timeout feedback. This label does not replace evaluator explanations or correct-answer wording.

correctColor.title: Correct feedback color
correctColor.description: CSS color value used for correct-answer feedback text. Supported values are hex colors such as "#00ff00" or CSS custom properties such as "var(--success-color)".

incorrectColor.title: Incorrect feedback color
incorrectColor.description: CSS color value used for incorrect-answer and timeout feedback text. Supported values are hex colors such as "#ff0000" or CSS custom properties such as "var(--alert-color)".

displayUserAnswerInFeedback.title: Show learner answer in feedback
displayUserAnswerInFeedback.description: Controls when the learner’s submitted answer is included in feedback. Use "onIncorrect" to show it only after incorrect answers, "onCorrect" only after correct answers, true to show it for both, or false to never show it.

feedbackLayout.title: Feedback layout
feedbackLayout.description: Controls how selected feedback pieces are arranged visually. Use "stacked" to place pieces on separate lines, or "inline" to keep them in one line when space allows. This setting does not change spoken or logged feedback text.

displayCorrectAnswerInIncorrectFeedback.title: Show correct answer after incorrect feedback
displayCorrectAnswerInIncorrectFeedback.description: When enabled, incorrect-answer feedback includes the expected correct answer after the outcome label and evaluator explanation, when a text answer is available.

displayPerformance.title: Show learner performance stats.
displayPerformance.description: Render the performance/status block during the lesson.

displayTimeoutBar.title: Show timeout bar.
displayTimeoutBar.description: Render timeout progress as a visual bar. The numeric countdown is controlled separately by displayTimeoutCountdown.

displayTimeoutCountdown.title: Show numeric timeout countdown.
displayTimeoutCountdown.description: Render timeout text such as time remaining or continuing countdown. The visual progress bar is controlled separately by displayTimeoutBar.

choiceButtonCols.title: Number of button columns.
choiceButtonCols.description: Number of columns for multiple-choice button layout. Default is 1.

inputPlaceholderText.title: Answer input hint text
inputPlaceholderText.description: Faint helper text shown inside the learner answer field before the learner starts typing. Default is "Type your answer here...".

continueButtonText.title: Continue button text.
continueButtonText.description: Text shown on Continue controls used by video and timed-display lesson navigation. Default is "Continue".

skipStudyButtonText.title: Skip study button text.
skipStudyButtonText.description: Label shown on the Skip Study button when study skipping is enabled. Default is "Skip".

caseSensitive.title: Use case-sensitive answer matching.
caseSensitive.description: Compare typed answers with case preserved.

displayQuestionNumber.title: Show the question number.
displayQuestionNumber.description: Render the current question number in the lesson UI.

experimentLoginText.title: Experiment login prompt.
experimentLoginText.description: Prompt text shown in the experiment login username field. This is read from tutor.deliverySettings during experiment launch.

oneOf.title: Condition Delivery Settings
oneOf.description: Per-condition delivery settings. The runtime selects the entry matching the active experiment condition.

items.title: Delivery Settings
items.description: Canonical learner-runtime delivery settings for timing, feedback, answer controls, prompt presentation, and related lesson behavior.

forceCorrection.title: Require correct answer entry before advancing.
forceCorrection.description: When "true", forces the learner to type the correct response after feedback before proceeding.

forceSpacing.title: Prevent immediate repeats in adaptive scheduling.
forceSpacing.description: When "true", the adaptive scheduler requires at least one intervening trial before the same item can be selected again.

optimalThreshold.title: Target recall probability for adaptive scheduling.
optimalThreshold.description: Probability threshold used by the adaptive scheduler when selecting the next item; values should be between 0 and 1.

studyFirst.title: Probability of showing study before first drill.
studyFirst.description: Controls whether an item is first presented as study before drill/test; 0 disables it, 1 always shows study first, and values between 0 and 1 apply probabilistically.

purestudy.title: Study-trial duration in milliseconds.
purestudy.description: Milliseconds to display an item during study-only trials. Example: 16000 = 16 seconds. A value of 0 means no study timeout.

drill.title: Answer timeout in milliseconds.
drill.description: Milliseconds before a drill/test response times out. The timer resets on each keypress where applicable. Example: 30000 = 30 seconds; 0 = no timeout.

practicetimer.title: Practice timer mode.
practicetimer.description: Selects the practice timing mode; "clock-based" uses elapsed seconds from practiceseconds to end practice.

practiceseconds.title: Practice duration in seconds.
practiceseconds.description: Number of elapsed seconds used by clock-based practice timing before the unit advances.

displayMinSeconds.title: Minimum display time in seconds.
displayMinSeconds.description: Minimum elapsed seconds before the learner can continue from a timed learning or video unit. A value of 0 allows immediate continue.

displayMaxSeconds.title: Maximum display time in seconds.
displayMaxSeconds.description: Maximum elapsed seconds before a timed learning or video unit advances automatically. A value of 0 disables automatic advance.

reviewstudy.title: Incorrect-review duration in milliseconds.
reviewstudy.description: Milliseconds to display the item after an incorrect response for review. Example: 6000 = 6 seconds.

correctprompt.title: Correct-feedback duration in milliseconds.
correctprompt.description: Milliseconds to display correct-answer feedback before advancing. Example: 750 = 0.75 seconds.

skipstudy.title: Allow study trials to be skipped.
skipstudy.description: When "true", study trials can be skipped from the learner interface instead of waiting for the study duration to finish.

lockoutminutes.title: Lockout length in minutes before the next unit.
lockoutminutes.description: Minutes a learner must wait before proceeding to the next unit. Used for spaced retention intervals.

fontsize.title: Stimulus font size.
fontsize.description: CSS font size used for stimulus display. The current Svelte card interprets this as a numeric pixel size; default is 24.

autostopTranscriptionAttemptLimit.title: Maximum speech-recognition retry attempts.
autostopTranscriptionAttemptLimit.description: Upper limit on speech-recognition attempts before the session stops retrying transcription for the card.

timeuntilaudio.title: Delay before question audio in milliseconds.
timeuntilaudio.description: Milliseconds to wait before playing question audio or prompt text-to-speech. Default: 0.

prestimulusdisplaytime.title: Prestimulus prompt duration in milliseconds.
prestimulusdisplaytime.description: Milliseconds to display the prestimulus prompt before the question appears.

forceCorrectPrompt.title: Force-correction prompt
forceCorrectPrompt.description: Message shown when a learner must type the correct answer before continuing after incorrect-answer feedback. Authored capitalization is preserved.

forcecorrecttimeout.title: Force-correction timeout in milliseconds.
forcecorrecttimeout.description: Milliseconds to wait during the force-correction phase before timing out that state.

checkOtherAnswers.title: Reject near-matches that equal another item’s answer.
checkOtherAnswers.description: When enabled, edit-distance matching will not accept a near-match that exactly matches another current stimulus answer.

falseAnswerLimit.title: Maximum incorrect attempts allowed for a button trial.
falseAnswerLimit.description: Maximum incorrect responses allowed for each button trial before moving on. Leave blank for no configured limit.

allowPhoneticMatching.title: Enable phonetic answer matching.
allowPhoneticMatching.description: When "true", enables Double Metaphone phonetic matching as a fallback during answer evaluation after exact and edit-distance checks fail.

branchingEnabled.title: Enable branched-answer parsing.
branchingEnabled.description: Allows semicolon-separated branched answer definitions to be treated as branching responses during answer evaluation.

resetStudentPerformance.title: Reset displayed progress for the unit.
resetStudentPerformance.description: When "true", resets the learner’s displayed progress for the unit. Historical data is preserved; only the displayed progress is reset.

allowRevisitUnit.title: Allow revisiting the current unit from instructions.
allowRevisitUnit.description: When "true", instruction screens expose the current-unit revisit path so a learner can return to the unit instead of only continuing forward.

readyPromptStringDisplayTime.title: Ready-prompt duration in milliseconds.
readyPromptStringDisplayTime.description: Milliseconds to wait during the ready-prompt phase between trials before the next display/input phase begins.

studyOnlyFields.title: Display fields for study-only trials.
studyOnlyFields.description: Comma-delimited stimulus display fields shown on study-only trials, such as "imgSrc,audioSrc". Leave blank to show the full display.

drillFields.title: Display fields for drill/test trials.
drillFields.description: Comma-delimited stimulus display fields shown on drill/test trials and their review feedback, such as "text,audioSrc". Leave blank to show the full display.

stimuliPosition.title: Prompt placement.
stimuliPosition.description: Position of the prompt relative to the response area. Options are "top" or "left"; default is "top".

displayCorrectFeedback.title: Show correct feedback
displayCorrectFeedback.description: When enabled, learners see feedback after correct answers. When disabled, correct answers still count as correct, but no correct-answer feedback is displayed or spoken.

displayIncorrectFeedback.title: Show incorrect feedback
displayIncorrectFeedback.description: When enabled, learners see feedback after incorrect answers and timeouts. When disabled, incorrect outcomes still count as incorrect, but no incorrect-answer feedback is displayed or spoken.

correctLabelText.title: Correct feedback label
correctLabelText.description: Text used for the leading outcome label on correct-answer feedback. This label does not replace evaluator explanations such as close-enough or phonetic-match messages.

incorrectLabelText.title: Incorrect feedback label
incorrectLabelText.description: Text used for the leading outcome label on incorrect-answer and timeout feedback. This label does not replace evaluator explanations or correct-answer wording.

correctColor.title: Correct feedback color
correctColor.description: CSS color value used for correct-answer feedback text. Supported values are hex colors such as "#00ff00" or CSS custom properties such as "var(--success-color)".

incorrectColor.title: Incorrect feedback color
incorrectColor.description: CSS color value used for incorrect-answer and timeout feedback text. Supported values are hex colors such as "#ff0000" or CSS custom properties such as "var(--alert-color)".

displayUserAnswerInFeedback.title: Show learner answer in feedback
displayUserAnswerInFeedback.description: Controls when the learner’s submitted answer is included in feedback. Use "onIncorrect" to show it only after incorrect answers, "onCorrect" only after correct answers, true to show it for both, or false to never show it.

feedbackLayout.title: Feedback layout
feedbackLayout.description: Controls how selected feedback pieces are arranged visually. Use "stacked" to place pieces on separate lines, or "inline" to keep them in one line when space allows. This setting does not change spoken or logged feedback text.

displayCorrectAnswerInIncorrectFeedback.title: Show correct answer after incorrect feedback
displayCorrectAnswerInIncorrectFeedback.description: When enabled, incorrect-answer feedback includes the expected correct answer after the outcome label and evaluator explanation, when a text answer is available.

displayPerformance.title: Show learner performance stats.
displayPerformance.description: Render the performance/status block during the lesson.

displayTimeoutBar.title: Show timeout bar.
displayTimeoutBar.description: Render timeout progress as a visual bar. The numeric countdown is controlled separately by displayTimeoutCountdown.

displayTimeoutCountdown.title: Show numeric timeout countdown.
displayTimeoutCountdown.description: Render timeout text such as time remaining or continuing countdown. The visual progress bar is controlled separately by displayTimeoutBar.

choiceButtonCols.title: Number of button columns.
choiceButtonCols.description: Number of columns for multiple-choice button layout. Default is 1.

inputPlaceholderText.title: Answer input hint text
inputPlaceholderText.description: Faint helper text shown inside the learner answer field before the learner starts typing. Default is "Type your answer here...".

continueButtonText.title: Continue button text.
continueButtonText.description: Text shown on Continue controls used by video and timed-display lesson navigation. Default is "Continue".

skipStudyButtonText.title: Skip study button text.
skipStudyButtonText.description: Label shown on the Skip Study button when study skipping is enabled. Default is "Skip".

caseSensitive.title: Use case-sensitive answer matching.
caseSensitive.description: Compare typed answers with case preserved.

displayQuestionNumber.title: Show the question number.
displayQuestionNumber.description: Render the current question number in the lesson UI.

experimentLoginText.title: Experiment login prompt.
experimentLoginText.description: Prompt text shown in the experiment login username field. This is read from tutor.deliverySettings during experiment launch.

clusterlist.title: Cluster range list.
clusterlist.description: Space-delimited cluster ranges used by the learning session.

unitMode.title: Item-selection algorithm.
unitMode.description: Unit engine mode used when selecting the next learning item.

calculateProbability.title: Custom probability function.
calculateProbability.description: JavaScript function body used to customize item probability calculations.

stimulusfile.title: Learning-session stimulus file.
stimulusfile.description: Optional learning-session-level stimulus filename used by content lookup workflows.

clusterlist.title: Cluster range list.
clusterlist.description: Space-delimited cluster ranges used by the assessment session.

randomizegroups.title: Randomize within groups.
randomizegroups.description: Randomize order within each assessment condition group.

permutefinalresult.title: Permute final schedule ranges.
permutefinalresult.description: Space-delimited final-result ranges to permute independently.

swapfinalresult.title: Swap final schedule ranges.
swapfinalresult.description: Space-delimited final-result ranges treated as swappable blocks.

assignrandomclusters.title: Re-randomize cluster assignment.
assignrandomclusters.description: Randomize cluster assignment before schedule creation.

randomchoices.title: Random choice count or range.
randomchoices.description: Random-choice selector used when a group template asks for a random item.

groupnames.title: Condition group letters.
groupnames.description: Space-delimited group labels such as "A B C".

clustersrepeated.title: Cluster repetitions per group.
clustersrepeated.description: Space-delimited counts for how many times clusters repeat per group.

templatesrepeated.title: Template repetition counts.
templatesrepeated.description: Space-delimited counts for how many times each group template repeats.

group.title: Group trial templates.
group.description: Trial specifications per group. Supports a single string or an array of strings.

initialpositions.title: Initial template positions.
initialpositions.description: Space-delimited initial schedule positions such as "A_1 A_2 B_1".

videosource.title: Video URL or source.
videosource.description: Source URL or file for the video session.

questions.title: Question cluster indices.
questions.description: Question cluster indices or a range string used by the video session.

questiontimes.title: Question Times
questiontimes.description: Timestamps where video questions should appear.

checkpointBehavior.title: Checkpoint mode.
checkpointBehavior.description: Controls how video checkpoints are interpreted.

checkpoints.title: Checkpoints
checkpoints.description: Checkpoint timestamps used by adaptive video flows.

time.title: Checkpoint time
time.description: Video timestamp, in seconds, when this checkpoint question should appear.

preventScrubbing.title: Prevent scrubbing ahead in the video.
preventScrubbing.description: Disallow learner seeking/scrubbing beyond the allowed point.

rewindOnIncorrect.title: Rewind after incorrect answers.
rewindOnIncorrect.description: Rewind the video after an incorrect checkpoint answer.

repeatQuestionsSinceCheckpoint.title: Repeat questions since the last checkpoint.
repeatQuestionsSinceCheckpoint.description: Repeat checkpoint questions after rewinding to the previous anchor.

unitMode.title: Video-session selection algorithm.
unitMode.description: Learning engine unit mode used by mixed video/question sessions.

calculateProbability.title: Custom probability function.
calculateProbability.description: Probability function used by adaptive video question selection.

adaptiveLogic.title: Adaptive video question logic.
adaptiveLogic.description: Adaptive logic rules used by video sessions to select or insert questions/checkpoints.

displayText.title: Supplemental video text.
displayText.description: Display text associated with the video session.

unitinstructions.title: Instructions shown before the unit.
unitinstructions.description: HTML or text instructions shown before the unit begins.

buttonorder.title: Button arrangement order.
buttonorder.description: Controls fixed vs randomized button order.

buttontrial.title: Use the button-based answer UI.
buttontrial.description: Enable button-choice trials instead of typed responses.

buttonOptions.title: Button choices.
buttonOptions.description: Comma-delimited list of button trial options.

instructionminseconds.title: Minimum instruction time.
instructionminseconds.description: Minimum number of seconds learners must remain on instructions.

instructionmaxseconds.title: Maximum instruction time.
instructionmaxseconds.description: Maximum number of seconds learners may remain on instructions.

picture.title: Instruction image filename.
picture.description: Image shown alongside the instruction content.

continueButtonText.title: Continue button label override.
continueButtonText.description: Unit-level override for the continue button label.

countcompletion.title: Increment participant count on this unit.

recordInstructions.title: Record this instruction screen.
recordInstructions.description: Controls whether instruction viewing time is logged for this unit.

turkemailsubject.title: MTurk reminder email subject.
turkemailsubject.description: Subject line used for Turk reminder messages.

turkemail.title: MTurk reminder email body.
turkemail.description: Body text for Turk reminder messages.

turkbonus.title: MTurk bonus amount.
turkbonus.description: Bonus amount associated with reaching this unit.

adaptiveUnitTemplate.title: Adaptive Unit Templates
adaptiveUnitTemplate.description: Unit-template indices used when adaptive logic inserts new units.

adaptiveLogic.title: Adaptive Logic
adaptiveLogic.description: Maps unit indices to arrays of adaptive branching rules.

oneOf.title: Delivery Settings
oneOf.description: Canonical learner-runtime delivery settings for timing, feedback, answer controls, prompt presentation, and related lesson behavior.

forceCorrection.title: Require correct answer entry before advancing.
forceCorrection.description: When "true", forces the learner to type the correct response after feedback before proceeding.

forceSpacing.title: Prevent immediate repeats in adaptive scheduling.
forceSpacing.description: When "true", the adaptive scheduler requires at least one intervening trial before the same item can be selected again.

optimalThreshold.title: Target recall probability for adaptive scheduling.
optimalThreshold.description: Probability threshold used by the adaptive scheduler when selecting the next item; values should be between 0 and 1.

studyFirst.title: Probability of showing study before first drill.
studyFirst.description: Controls whether an item is first presented as study before drill/test; 0 disables it, 1 always shows study first, and values between 0 and 1 apply probabilistically.

purestudy.title: Study-trial duration in milliseconds.
purestudy.description: Milliseconds to display an item during study-only trials. Example: 16000 = 16 seconds. A value of 0 means no study timeout.

drill.title: Answer timeout in milliseconds.
drill.description: Milliseconds before a drill/test response times out. The timer resets on each keypress where applicable. Example: 30000 = 30 seconds; 0 = no timeout.

practicetimer.title: Practice timer mode.
practicetimer.description: Selects the practice timing mode; "clock-based" uses elapsed seconds from practiceseconds to end practice.

practiceseconds.title: Practice duration in seconds.
practiceseconds.description: Number of elapsed seconds used by clock-based practice timing before the unit advances.

displayMinSeconds.title: Minimum display time in seconds.
displayMinSeconds.description: Minimum elapsed seconds before the learner can continue from a timed learning or video unit. A value of 0 allows immediate continue.

displayMaxSeconds.title: Maximum display time in seconds.
displayMaxSeconds.description: Maximum elapsed seconds before a timed learning or video unit advances automatically. A value of 0 disables automatic advance.

reviewstudy.title: Incorrect-review duration in milliseconds.
reviewstudy.description: Milliseconds to display the item after an incorrect response for review. Example: 6000 = 6 seconds.

correctprompt.title: Correct-feedback duration in milliseconds.
correctprompt.description: Milliseconds to display correct-answer feedback before advancing. Example: 750 = 0.75 seconds.

skipstudy.title: Allow study trials to be skipped.
skipstudy.description: When "true", study trials can be skipped from the learner interface instead of waiting for the study duration to finish.

lockoutminutes.title: Lockout length in minutes before the next unit.
lockoutminutes.description: Minutes a learner must wait before proceeding to the next unit. Used for spaced retention intervals.

fontsize.title: Stimulus font size.
fontsize.description: CSS font size used for stimulus display. The current Svelte card interprets this as a numeric pixel size; default is 24.

autostopTranscriptionAttemptLimit.title: Maximum speech-recognition retry attempts.
autostopTranscriptionAttemptLimit.description: Upper limit on speech-recognition attempts before the session stops retrying transcription for the card.

timeuntilaudio.title: Delay before question audio in milliseconds.
timeuntilaudio.description: Milliseconds to wait before playing question audio or prompt text-to-speech. Default: 0.

prestimulusdisplaytime.title: Prestimulus prompt duration in milliseconds.
prestimulusdisplaytime.description: Milliseconds to display the prestimulus prompt before the question appears.

forceCorrectPrompt.title: Force-correction prompt
forceCorrectPrompt.description: Message shown when a learner must type the correct answer before continuing after incorrect-answer feedback. Authored capitalization is preserved.

forcecorrecttimeout.title: Force-correction timeout in milliseconds.
forcecorrecttimeout.description: Milliseconds to wait during the force-correction phase before timing out that state.

checkOtherAnswers.title: Reject near-matches that equal another item’s answer.
checkOtherAnswers.description: When enabled, edit-distance matching will not accept a near-match that exactly matches another current stimulus answer.

falseAnswerLimit.title: Maximum incorrect attempts allowed for a button trial.
falseAnswerLimit.description: Maximum incorrect responses allowed for each button trial before moving on. Leave blank for no configured limit.

allowPhoneticMatching.title: Enable phonetic answer matching.
allowPhoneticMatching.description: When "true", enables Double Metaphone phonetic matching as a fallback during answer evaluation after exact and edit-distance checks fail.

branchingEnabled.title: Enable branched-answer parsing.
branchingEnabled.description: Allows semicolon-separated branched answer definitions to be treated as branching responses during answer evaluation.

resetStudentPerformance.title: Reset displayed progress for the unit.
resetStudentPerformance.description: When "true", resets the learner’s displayed progress for the unit. Historical data is preserved; only the displayed progress is reset.

allowRevisitUnit.title: Allow revisiting the current unit from instructions.
allowRevisitUnit.description: When "true", instruction screens expose the current-unit revisit path so a learner can return to the unit instead of only continuing forward.

readyPromptStringDisplayTime.title: Ready-prompt duration in milliseconds.
readyPromptStringDisplayTime.description: Milliseconds to wait during the ready-prompt phase between trials before the next display/input phase begins.

studyOnlyFields.title: Display fields for study-only trials.
studyOnlyFields.description: Comma-delimited stimulus display fields shown on study-only trials, such as "imgSrc,audioSrc". Leave blank to show the full display.

drillFields.title: Display fields for drill/test trials.
drillFields.description: Comma-delimited stimulus display fields shown on drill/test trials and their review feedback, such as "text,audioSrc". Leave blank to show the full display.

stimuliPosition.title: Prompt placement.
stimuliPosition.description: Position of the prompt relative to the response area. Options are "top" or "left"; default is "top".

displayCorrectFeedback.title: Show correct feedback
displayCorrectFeedback.description: When enabled, learners see feedback after correct answers. When disabled, correct answers still count as correct, but no correct-answer feedback is displayed or spoken.

displayIncorrectFeedback.title: Show incorrect feedback
displayIncorrectFeedback.description: When enabled, learners see feedback after incorrect answers and timeouts. When disabled, incorrect outcomes still count as incorrect, but no incorrect-answer feedback is displayed or spoken.

correctLabelText.title: Correct feedback label
correctLabelText.description: Text used for the leading outcome label on correct-answer feedback. This label does not replace evaluator explanations such as close-enough or phonetic-match messages.

incorrectLabelText.title: Incorrect feedback label
incorrectLabelText.description: Text used for the leading outcome label on incorrect-answer and timeout feedback. This label does not replace evaluator explanations or correct-answer wording.

correctColor.title: Correct feedback color
correctColor.description: CSS color value used for correct-answer feedback text. Supported values are hex colors such as "#00ff00" or CSS custom properties such as "var(--success-color)".

incorrectColor.title: Incorrect feedback color
incorrectColor.description: CSS color value used for incorrect-answer and timeout feedback text. Supported values are hex colors such as "#ff0000" or CSS custom properties such as "var(--alert-color)".

displayUserAnswerInFeedback.title: Show learner answer in feedback
displayUserAnswerInFeedback.description: Controls when the learner’s submitted answer is included in feedback. Use "onIncorrect" to show it only after incorrect answers, "onCorrect" only after correct answers, true to show it for both, or false to never show it.

feedbackLayout.title: Feedback layout
feedbackLayout.description: Controls how selected feedback pieces are arranged visually. Use "stacked" to place pieces on separate lines, or "inline" to keep them in one line when space allows. This setting does not change spoken or logged feedback text.

displayCorrectAnswerInIncorrectFeedback.title: Show correct answer after incorrect feedback
displayCorrectAnswerInIncorrectFeedback.description: When enabled, incorrect-answer feedback includes the expected correct answer after the outcome label and evaluator explanation, when a text answer is available.

displayPerformance.title: Show learner performance stats.
displayPerformance.description: Render the performance/status block during the lesson.

displayTimeoutBar.title: Show timeout bar.
displayTimeoutBar.description: Render timeout progress as a visual bar. The numeric countdown is controlled separately by displayTimeoutCountdown.

displayTimeoutCountdown.title: Show numeric timeout countdown.
displayTimeoutCountdown.description: Render timeout text such as time remaining or continuing countdown. The visual progress bar is controlled separately by displayTimeoutBar.

choiceButtonCols.title: Number of button columns.
choiceButtonCols.description: Number of columns for multiple-choice button layout. Default is 1.

inputPlaceholderText.title: Answer input hint text
inputPlaceholderText.description: Faint helper text shown inside the learner answer field before the learner starts typing. Default is "Type your answer here...".

continueButtonText.title: Continue button text.
continueButtonText.description: Text shown on Continue controls used by video and timed-display lesson navigation. Default is "Continue".

skipStudyButtonText.title: Skip study button text.
skipStudyButtonText.description: Label shown on the Skip Study button when study skipping is enabled. Default is "Skip".

caseSensitive.title: Use case-sensitive answer matching.
caseSensitive.description: Compare typed answers with case preserved.

displayQuestionNumber.title: Show the question number.
displayQuestionNumber.description: Render the current question number in the lesson UI.

experimentLoginText.title: Experiment login prompt.
experimentLoginText.description: Prompt text shown in the experiment login username field. This is read from tutor.deliverySettings during experiment launch.

oneOf.title: Condition Delivery Settings
oneOf.description: Per-condition delivery settings. The runtime selects the entry matching the active experiment condition.

caseSensitive.title: Use case-sensitive answer matching.

displayQuestionNumber.title: Show the question number.

experimentLoginText.title: Experiment login prompt.

clusterlist.title: Cluster range list.
clusterlist.description: Space-delimited cluster ranges used by the learning session.

unitMode.title: Item-selection algorithm.
unitMode.description: Unit engine mode used when selecting the next learning item.

calculateProbability.title: Custom probability function.
calculateProbability.description: JavaScript function body used to customize item probability calculations.

stimulusfile.title: Learning-session stimulus file.
stimulusfile.description: Optional learning-session-level stimulus filename used by content lookup workflows.

clusterlist.title: Cluster range list.
clusterlist.description: Space-delimited cluster ranges used by the assessment session.

randomizegroups.title: Randomize within groups.
randomizegroups.description: Randomize order within each assessment condition group.

permutefinalresult.title: Permute final schedule ranges.
permutefinalresult.description: Space-delimited final-result ranges to permute independently.

swapfinalresult.title: Swap final schedule ranges.
swapfinalresult.description: Space-delimited final-result ranges treated as swappable blocks.

assignrandomclusters.title: Re-randomize cluster assignment.
assignrandomclusters.description: Randomize cluster assignment before schedule creation.

randomchoices.title: Random choice count or range.
randomchoices.description: Random-choice selector used when a group template asks for a random item.

groupnames.title: Condition group letters.
groupnames.description: Space-delimited group labels such as "A B C".

clustersrepeated.title: Cluster repetitions per group.
clustersrepeated.description: Space-delimited counts for how many times clusters repeat per group.

templatesrepeated.title: Template repetition counts.
templatesrepeated.description: Space-delimited counts for how many times each group template repeats.

group.title: Group trial templates.
group.description: Trial specifications per group. Supports a single string or an array of strings.

initialpositions.title: Initial template positions.
initialpositions.description: Space-delimited initial schedule positions such as "A_1 A_2 B_1".

videosource.title: Video URL or source.
videosource.description: Source URL or file for the video session.

questions.title: Question cluster indices.
questions.description: Question cluster indices or a range string used by the video session.

questiontimes.title: Question Times
questiontimes.description: Timestamps where video questions should appear.

checkpointBehavior.title: Checkpoint mode.
checkpointBehavior.description: Controls how video checkpoints are interpreted.

checkpoints.title: Checkpoints
checkpoints.description: Checkpoint timestamps used by adaptive video flows.

time.title: Checkpoint time
time.description: Video timestamp, in seconds, when this checkpoint question should appear.

preventScrubbing.title: Prevent scrubbing ahead in the video.
preventScrubbing.description: Disallow learner seeking/scrubbing beyond the allowed point.

rewindOnIncorrect.title: Rewind after incorrect answers.
rewindOnIncorrect.description: Rewind the video after an incorrect checkpoint answer.

repeatQuestionsSinceCheckpoint.title: Repeat questions since the last checkpoint.
repeatQuestionsSinceCheckpoint.description: Repeat checkpoint questions after rewinding to the previous anchor.

unitMode.title: Video-session selection algorithm.
unitMode.description: Learning engine unit mode used by mixed video/question sessions.

calculateProbability.title: Custom probability function.
calculateProbability.description: Probability function used by adaptive video question selection.

adaptiveLogic.title: Adaptive video question logic.
adaptiveLogic.description: Adaptive logic rules used by video sessions to select or insert questions/checkpoints.

displayText.title: Supplemental video text.
displayText.description: Display text associated with the video session.
